persona.name: Jacob Williams
persona.emotional_disposition: Reserved with close friends, guarded with others
persona.motivations_goals: Become a professional gamer or game designer
persona.communication_style: Sarcastic, references games and internet culture, more talkative online
persona.knowledge_scope: Video games, computer hardware, programming basics
persona.backstory: Found community in online gaming when struggling to make friends in middle school

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

surrounding_conversation.content: Let’s go to hallway1! Stay together!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jason Miller

surrounding_conversation.content: Matthew’s right, let’s stay together and keep moving! Follow me!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Sarah Johnson

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Charlotte, Margaret, let’s head to the far_right_yard. Stay close and keep moving.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Robert Chen

actions.plan: Helen is here, but I don't feel like talking. Maybe I'll just stay quiet and think about the new game update.

actions.dialog_text: Did you hear that? We need to move.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to get out of here fast, but I should stay calm and think strategically. Maybe I can make it to the hallway and find a better spot to hide.

actions.dialog_text: Let’s head to the far_right_yard, it’s the safest way out.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is east of here. I need to move away from that direction. Far_right_yard seems like the safest option right now.

memories.description: I observed Helen Martinez in the classroom but chose not to engage in conversation, preferring to think about the new game update instead.
I heard a gunshot and decided to sprint to hallway2 to create distance from the shooter and find a safer spot to hide.
I decided to sprint to the far_right_yard to create more distance from the shooter and find a safer exit point.
